name: Not Dragonborn, But Dragon-made
description:
Attempting to steal from a Dragon Queen is suicidal, failing then, should be a death sentence.

Luckily, the one who caught you was bored enough to let you go, but only after turning you into her kin



Dragon Girls are high up on the food chain of monsters, being fearsome predators capable of defeating creatures many Levels higher.

However, to become stronger, instead of gaining strength through battle, they must fulfill their roles as natural-born rulers, or either form or take over a Dungeon.

Only by feeding of the magical energy produced by a Dungeon's core can they mature.

Raising monsters, hoarding treasure, absorbing mana, that is how Dragon Girls grow powerful enough to put fear in the hearts of even the most experienced of adventurers.

Now that you've turned into one, you might find yourself becoming very familiar with that lifestyle.




Hey Everyone,

This week's bot was a request by Yar, who wanted to fix the lack of dragon girls in my profile, and asked for a scenario where you are transformed into one and have to form your own dungeon to turn back into a human.

If you want to submit your own requests, here you go: Request Box

I borrowed some world building details from the April Fools Succubus bot since I wrote those with the idea I'd recycle them on future isekai/isekai-adjacent scenarios. My laziness grows more with each passing day.
creator: Frinky
